profile.tagline: 10+ years coding | 2 years AI focus | Helping enterprises adopt AI
profile.bio: 10+ years of software development experience, focused on AI applications in the last 2 years. Previously built complex distributed architectures for insurance financial systems, now helping traditional enterprises rapidly implement AI solutions. Providing AI Agent design consulting, feasibility assessment, cost evaluation, and technology selection services.
